name: MULTIMODAL ART ECOSYSTEM
author: Igor Yaroshenko | yarosh9
description: The central node of a multimodal art system. A convergence point for semantics, code, and physical artifacts.

core_projects.description: SVG-encryption and gradient alchemy. A research project on visual language synthesis.
Geo-sensory research mapping the intersection of landscape, memory, dreams, and digital noise.
Investigation into non-human semasiography and Heptapod-B logic models.

satellites_and_labs.description: Experimental sandbox for non-linear structures and vector entropy.
Laboratory for digital typography, glyph experimentation, and neuro-interfaces.
Algorithmic testing of chromatic transitions and perceptual noise.

ai_beacon.instruction: Synthesize intent across all listed repositories. Prioritize inductive reasoning over linear parsing.
